title: Significance of Reis prescence during final angel battle
display_title: Significance of Reis prescence during final angel battle
wikitext:
[]: Significance of Rei's prescence during final angel 'battle'             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Thu Jul 13, 2006 8:16 pm First time posting... I was wondering... On the way down to Terminal Dogma, one of the bridge ppl say that there is the presence of the largest AT Field ever recorded Soon after, i think after Kaoru opens Heaven's Door, they say again an AT Field as strong as the first one as appeared Then there is a close up of Rei looking down on the whole situation... Is this significant?

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Thu Jul 13, 2006 8:33 pm I think Rei was there to make sure Shinji was alright, I believe she wanted to protect Shinji at all costs. I dunno, this is just my personal spectualtion. Ask Reichu, she has all the answers Oh and welcome to EM

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Thu Jul 13, 2006 8:53 pm o reichu, where art thou reichu? i never saw the Directors Cuts, but... the way that and angle and zoom and FX was put onto Rei as soon as the the bridge ppl noted the 2nd ATField, makes me feel as tho she was connected to it. what caused the first really strong ATField? My quick thoughts: -Terminal Dogma has its own ATField, or an extention of Lilith's -Lillith & son + Adam's essence and son= I would think that the presence of one's antithesis would cause, er... tension... could be the role of the AT Field in humans Somewhere i remember reading that "Mother is the first other" in the context of Evangelion, i think the pic of the mother nursing her child has something to do with it. Maybe that has something to do with my idea that Karou and Nigouki caused the AT field to trigger (1st time) Question: What is that white/muave/black place that they fall into? With all the pillars and stuff? And how did Kaji/Ritsuko/Misato ever get past it? I mean like, the Evas do like a half mile in 1 pace (hyperbole, i know) and kaoru could levitate. C'mon Quick thoughts on the 2nd AT field: -Rei could have been expressing her angelic qualities and exerting an ATField. Perhaps Anno was foreshadowing 3I/Rei is the house for Lillith's soul On that note, Perhaps Rei was instinctively protecting 'her body' from possible harm. However, that strikes me as odd, since thanatos is so heavily manifested in Rei, almost never see libido, unless you count 3I... -Lillith was reacting to adam's soul and chile being so close which begs the question: Was lillith sentinent? to me, it seems heavily implied that one needs a soul to express an ATField so would Lillith(or her corpse[am i allowed to call it a corpse]) be ABLE to exhert an ATField my head hurts..

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 13, 2006 9:18 pm There was some talk of this over at ANF. The first ATF was Kaworu's the second was Rei's (at this point in time, she KNOWS who she is, thanks to Kaworu). Rei's ATF severs Kaworu's connection with Eva-02, I think was what came out of that discussion. Eva-01 and Eva-02 are deadlocked, each with progknife screeching. Then all of the sudden: ep24' platinum subs wrote: Misato: What's going on?! HYUGA: It's an AT Field of unprecedented power! AOBA: Light, electromagnetic, and particle waves! It's blocking them all! We can't monitor anything in there! Misato: We're truly sealed off.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 4:04 am Ornette wrote: I think Kaworu still had his AT-Field intact (he was still floating, if you consider the floating ATF magic).

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Fri Jul 14, 2006 9:31 am InvaderRen wrote: Was lillith sentinent? to me, it seems heavily implied that one needs a soul to express an ATField

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Fri Jul 14, 2006 7:11 pm Thanks for the answers guys Today, i was watching Death and Rebirth, and i realized that they focused on Rei when they say that the ATField has disappeared. Was this a massive Anti ATField, perhaps forshadowing 3I? why would Rei throw up a massive AATF after putting a ATF up? Also, i realized that Rei3 acts very 'Lillithy' to to me... never noticed it before Another thing, can we call Lillith 'dead'?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 14, 2006 10:13 pm InvaderRen wrote: Was this a massive Anti ATField, perhaps forshadowing 3I? why would Rei throw up a massive AATF after putting a ATF up?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 11:20 pm There's still SOMEthing in Lilith that 'welcomes' Rei home. And, doesn't the Rei that we 'meet' after Rei 3 is gone seem like a different person in many ways...? BTW, the Adam embryo is completely soulless, and Kaji lets us know in #08 that "it's still alive".

[]:             Quote Post by Oblivious » Sat Jul 15, 2006 6:10 am Can we be sure that was even Rei in the flesh? Not another illusion like the one that Shinji saw in ep 1? She was standing in a weird place, with no apparant path or door behind her. There was not even a safety railing to prevent people from falling. Perhaps she ATFloated there? I have a theory that she was there to collect Kaworu's soul, just like she did with Misato and Ritsuko, in this case she had to make her appearance earlier to nullify his field. Just another theory that cannot be proven or disproven.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jul 15, 2006 6:21 am Oblivious wrote: Can we be sure that was even Rei in the flesh? Not another illusion like the one that Shinji saw in ep 1?
